Whether you live in one of the charming single-family homes near Fort Schuyler or a multi-family building along East Tremont Avenue, our licensed technicians provide comprehensive flea extermination services priced between $350 and $650. faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Throgs Neck?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Throgs Neck typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and number of rooms requiring treatment. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work in Throgs Neck homes?
faqs.answer: Most customers see significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as treatments target adult fleas, larvae, and eggs through multiple life cycles. We schedule follow-up visits to ensure total eradication.

faqs.question: Are flea treatments safe for pets and children in Throgs Neck?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces dry completely, then your home is safe to enjoy flea-free.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment in Throgs Neck?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC offers same-day and emergency flea treatment services throughout Throgs Neck, including areas near Silver Beach, Fort Schuyler, and along the waterfront. Call us before noon for potential same-day service, and we also offer convenient weekend appointments.
